title: centella coriacea
intro: Centella coriacea, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of medicinal plant in the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centella coriacea include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
